title: Generated Output Footprint
goal: Implement #441 by classifying generated outputs as reproducible derived footprint in report/check output.
non_goals: Do not treat generated proof fixtures as hand-authored docs.
Do not move generator infrastructure to a new repo in this slice.

intent.outcome: Generated outputs are reported by role, maturity, freshness/reproducibility check availability, and unclassified residue.
intent.constraints: Keep generated outputs derived and selector-backed.
intent.latitude: Add compact operational_compression fields and regression coverage.
intent.escalation: Escalate if freshness proof must run expensive Docker checks during ordinary report.

execution.next_step: Archive the completed execplan, commit, push, and close #441 plus the dogfooding follow-up #475.
execution.proof: workspace CLI tests, generated package checks, planning surfaces, proof selector, and live operational_compression selector.

invariants: Generated outputs are not ordinary startup input.
Freshness checks are referenced, not run by report.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #436 operational footprint pressure for long-running package artifacts

required_continuation.activation trigger: after #441 closeout, parent #436 can close if no new footprint child remains open

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Generated outputs become inspectable as reproducible footprint without manual directory scans.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: close parent #436 if external evidence confirms all children are closed

context_budget.live working set: Issue #441, active execplan, operational_compression selector, command_package_ir, generated package check script, and workspace CLI tests.
context_budget.recoverable later: Archived execplan plus commit history after milestone closeout.
context_budget.externalize before shift: Update execution_run, proof_report, closure_check, and closeout_distillation before archiving.
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section operational_compression --format json
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Classify generated outputs by declared roots and maturity; do not run Docker in ordinary report.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: validation failure, unclassified generated output that needs a new owner, or generator freshness drift

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Make package use smaller and cheaper while preserving leverage.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Dogfood package surfaces, commit/push milestone, close the issue only after proof.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact compact field shape and candidate grouping.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: Report would need to execute expensive generation or Docker checks by default.

active_milestone.optional_deps: Docker proof can be run explicitly; ordinary report should not depend on it.

immediate_next_action: Archive completed plan and close the external issues after commit/push.
invariants: Generated outputs remain derived reproducible artifacts.
No generated output becomes first-line startup guidance.
Report surfaces checks and owners without executing expensive proof.
validation_commands: uv run ruff check src tests scripts

uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed src/agentic_workspace/cli.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/generated-output-footprint.plan.json --format json
uv run agentic-workspace defaults --section root_cli_authority --format json
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section workflow_obligations --format json
uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section closeout_trust --format json
uv run agentic-workspace skills --target . --task "dogfooding closeout review" --format json
completion_criteria: Generated outputs are reported as derived/reproducible artifacts.
Stale or unjustified generated outputs are visible as footprint pressure.
The report distinguishes generated proof fixtures from runnable/generated operating adapters.
No direct startup path is expanded.

execution_run.what happened: Added an advisory generated-output footprint measure to operational_compression, classified generated outputs by declared role, surfaced freshness/reproducibility commands without running expensive checks in ordinary report, and fixed dogfooded Docker proof flag composition through #475.
execution_run.scope touched: report/runtime inspection, workspace CLI tests, generated package check script, contract tooling tests, planning residue
execution_run.changed surfaces: operational_compression generated_output_footprint, artifact_footprint_by_class generated-output counting, generated package Docker proof composition, state.toml and active execplan
execution_run.validations run: uv run agentic-workspace preflight --target . --format json; uv run agentic-workspace summary --target . --format json; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run pytest tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests scripts; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --conformance --require-node; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --docker --require-docker; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --docker-conformance --require-docker; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed src/agentic_workspace/cli.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/generated-output-footprint.plan.json --format json; uv run agentic-workspace defaults --section root_cli_authority --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run agentic-workspace reconcile --format json; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section workflow_obligations --format json; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section closeout_trust --format json; uv run agentic-workspace skills --target . --task "dogfooding closeout review" --format json
execution_run.result for continuation: Generated output footprint is measured with no unclassified generated outputs in the live repo; #475 removes proof-script friction found while dogfooding.
execution_run.next step: Archive plan, commit, push, close #441 and #475, refresh external evidence, then reingest.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Generated outputs are now classified as reproducible derived footprint in operational_compression, including role counts, freshness/reproducibility commands, guardrails, and unclassified generated-output pressure.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: workspace CLI tests, contract tooling tests, ruff, planning surfaces, proof selection, root CLI authority, generated package static/conformance/Docker/Docker-conformance checks, doctor, reconcile, workflow obligations, closeout trust, skills, preflight, and summary all passed.
execution_summary.follow-on routed to: #475 was created and fixed for discovered Docker proof flag composition friction; no further follow-up is required for #441.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: The archived execplan, commit history, tests, and #441/#475 issue closure comments carry the durable evidence.
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): No Memory, docs, or config promotion was needed.
execution_summary.resume from: Refresh external evidence, close #436 if all children are closed, then ingest the next open lane.

proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: workspace CLI tests passed (188); contract tooling tests passed (27); ruff passed; generated package static/conformance/Docker/Docker-conformance checks passed; planning surfaces, proof selector, root CLI authority, doctor, reconcile, workflow, closeout, and skills selectors passed.

intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: operational_compression now reports generated_output_footprint with role counts, freshness commands, guardrails, and unclassified residue detection; tests cover declared generated surfaces, proof fixtures, runnable adapters, and cache-file exclusion.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The bounded slice and larger intent are both complete.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Prepared closeout records intent satisfaction, closure decision, proof evidence, and distillation buckets.
closure_check.reopen trigger: None unless new evidence shows the bounded closure was incomplete.

signals found: Generated package check accepted both --docker and --docker-conformance but returned after the first Docker path.
signals fixed: #475: Docker and Docker-conformance generated package proof flags now compose and have regression coverage.

discard.summary: No Memory, docs, or config promotion was needed for local execution detail.
